roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOT REQ MODIFICATION OF PROB COND & ORD SHORT TIME FILED
/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION REQUESTING PROBATION CONDITION MODIFICATION/MO GRTD//PROB MOD/EMTERM/CTORD: LCA TO REMOVE SCRAM DEVICE FROM DEFENDANT/CTORD:ALL OTHER TERMS OF PROBATION REMAIN/

/CTORD SENTENCE AS TO ALL COUNTS WITH SENTENCES ON COUNTS 1 & 2 STAYED/TW/CH3:CJSS 1Y:CPROB:PROB 1Y/X:81 DAYS COUNTY JAIL ARE PERMANENTLY WAIVED/EMTERM/CTORD::DEFENDANT TO BE PLACED ON SCRAM MONITORING BY LCA FOR THE ENTIRETY OF THE PROBATIONARY PERIOD/X:PROOF OF PLACEMENT ON MONITORING IS DUE TO THIS COURT NO LATER THAN 05-25-21/CTORD:LCA MAY REMOVE SCRAM DEVICE FORTHE PURPOSES OF ALLOWING THE DEFENDANT TO SERVE A COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IN STANISLAUS COUNTY/X:SURRENDER DATE FOR THE SENTENCE IS 06-30-21/CTORD:DO NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL/CTORD:DO NOT ENTER ANY BUSINESS THAT PRIMARILY SELLS ALCOHOL/RX/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO CONTINUE PARTICIPATING IN 2 AA MEETINGSPER WEEK/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL RESTRAINING ORDER CCH-19-582291/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/ /COLLECT/CCU/OBEY/ACCEP/SA1:KEVINRICHARD LEE;WILLIAM NG LEE;AARON CHRISTOPHER LEE;AILEEN OI WONG/SA2:931 DELANO AVE SF CA/SAORD4:3 YARDS/SAORD/REMA/CTORD:ACM IS TERMINATED/CTORD:THIS SENTENCE IS CONSECUTIVE TO SENTENCE ON CASE # 19013503/

/CAL PREHEARING CONFERENCE/FAVRPT/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THCOMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 9, 242PC, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/MISDRED1:1/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFTADV NL:1,2,9/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:TEMPORARY MODIFICATION OF GPS ORDER/NP/DAWT/CTORD:GPS MAY BE MODIFIEDAS FOLLOWS/EMMOD:GPS BRACELET MAY BE REMOVED ON THE MORNING OF FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 4, 2020 AND DEFENDANT MUST RETURN TO 70 OAK GROVE ON MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 7, 2020 NO LATER THAN 4 PM (1600 HOURS) TO BE RE-FITTED WITH A GPS BRACELET/X:PREHEARING DATE OF 09-29-20 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONF, MOTION TO DETAIN AND PC 4011,6 REPROT FOR BHC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/DEF:TO SUBMIT DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED; NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS; NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL-MARIJUANA; NOT CONSUME ANY REGULATED ANDOR CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE WITHOUT A PRESCRIPTION; CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL; ENGAGE ONLY IN PRE-APPROVED ACTIVITIES SUCH AS AA 3X PERWEEK; ACTIVITIES PER ACM; ATTEND COUNSELING-GROUPS ASDIRECTED; ABIDE BY ANY STAY AWAY ORDER (CIVIL RO & CPO), /CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEAIRNG CONF AND TO JOIN 19013503/SHER2:09-30-19/25    CPC 4011,6REPORT/X:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6 FOR BHC/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:11-15-19/4011,5/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF, MOTION TO DETAIN & RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:THE MOTION TO DETAIN IS FILED BY THE PEOPLE/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/NB/4011,5/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-17-19/X:FOR BHC/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/SA1:WILLIAML/SA2:931 DELANO AVE IN SF/SAORD3/SAORD/X:OTHER CONDITIONS INDICATED ON CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER/
/CAL:PROOF OF LCA DEVICE/DAWT/X:PROOF OF LCA HAS BEEN SUBMITTED TO THE COURT/CONTPROB/
/CAL: PRETRIAL CONF/X: TO SET OR DISPO NEXT DATE/X: TO SET OR DISPO NEXTDATE/CONT/DOPU: POSITIVE REPORT FROM ACM/
